<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, viewport-fit=cover, maximum-scale=5.0" />
<meta name="theme-color" content="#0a1323" />
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes" />
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black-translucent" />
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-title" content="Funded By Pyles" />
<meta name="format-detection" content="telephone=yes" />
<title>Funded By Pyles — Neal Pyles, Texas Mortgage Advisor</title>
<meta name="description" content="Funded By Pyles. Neal Pyles, mortgage advisor at Lone Star Financing in Frisco, Texas. Home loans and business funding with plain talk and real results across Texas." />
<meta property="og:title" content="Funded By Pyles" />
<meta property="og:description" content="Plain talk. Fast answers. Real Texas service." />
<meta property="og:type" content="website" />

<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Archivo+Black&family=DM+Serif+Display:ital@0;1&family=Manrope:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />

<style>
  :root {
    --night: #0f1a2e;
    --night-2: #1a2842;
    --night-3: #0a1323;
    --cream: #f5ead3;
    --cream-2: #ece0c4;
    --red: #c0392b;
    --red-light: #e74c3c;
    --red-dark: #922b21;
    --red-glow: rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.5);
    --bluebonnet: #3b4a8f;
    --ink-mute: rgba(245, 234, 211, 0.55);
    --line: rgba(245, 234, 211, 0.12);
    --line-2: rgba(245, 234, 211, 0.22);
  }

  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  body {
    font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif;
    background: var(--night-3);
    color: var(--cream);
    line-height: 1.5;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
    padding-left: env(safe-area-inset-left, 0px);
    padding-right: env(safe-area-inset-right, 0px);
  }

  .ambient { position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 0; pointer-events: none; overflow: hidden; }
  .ambient::before {
    content: ""; position: absolute; top: -10%; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
    width: 120%; height: 90vh;
    background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center top, rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.16), rgba(146, 43, 33, 0.07) 40%, transparent 70%);
    filter: blur(40px);
  }
  .ambient::after {
    content: ""; position: absolute; bottom: -10%; right: -10%;
    width: 70%; height: 60vh;
    background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(59, 74, 143, 0.22), transparent 60%);
    filter: blur(60px);
  }

  .grain {
    position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 1; pointer-events: none;
    opacity: 0.1; mix-blend-mode: overlay;
    background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='200' height='200'><filter id='n'><feTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.85' numOctaves='2' stitchTiles='stitch'/></filter><rect width='100%' height='100%' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='0.6'/></svg>");
  }

  .wrap { position: relative; z-index: 3; max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 32px; }

  /* Nav */
  nav {
    position: fixed; top: 20px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); z-index: 100;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 2px;
    padding: 8px 8px 8px 20px;
    background: rgba(15, 26, 46, 0.78);
    backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(140%);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(140%);
    border: 1px solid var(--line-2);
    border-radius: 100px;
    box-shadow: 0 20px 60px -20px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
  }
  nav .mark {
    font-family: 'Archivo Black', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: 0.02em; text-transform: uppercase;
    padding-right: 16px; border-right: 1px solid var(--line-2); margin-right: 6px;
    color: var(--cream);
  }
  nav .mark em { font-style: normal; color: var(--red); }
  nav a {
    color: var(--ink-mute); text-decoration: none; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500;
    padding: 9px 14px; border-radius: 100px; transition: color 0.2s, background 0.2s;
    font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  nav a:hover { color: var(--cream); background: rgba(245, 234, 211, 0.08); }
  nav .cta { background: var(--red); color: #fff; font-weight: 600; }
  nav .cta:hover { background: var(--cream); color: var(--night); }

  /* HERO */
  header {
    position: relative;
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 140px 0 100px;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center top, var(--night) 0%, var(--night-3) 60%);
  }
  header .skyline {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background-image: url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1545503054-0b3404a3a1dc?q=80&w=2000&auto=format&fit=crop');
    background-size: cover; background-position: center;
    filter: grayscale(0.6) brightness(0.3) contrast(1.15) saturate(1.1);
    opacity: 0.45;
  }
  header .skyline::after {
    content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background:
      linear-gradient(180deg, var(--night-3) 0%, rgba(15,26,46,0.5) 35%, rgba(15,26,46,0.7) 65%, var(--night-3) 100%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse at center, transparent 40%, var(--night-3) 85%);
  }
  .hero-inner { position: relative; z-index: 3; width: 100%; }

  .stamp {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px;
    font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 16px;
    letter-spacing: 0.35em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--red);
    margin-bottom: 32px;
  }
  .stamp .star { font-size: 14px; }

  .brand-lockup {
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 28px; flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .brand-lockup .line { width: 80px; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--line-2), transparent); }
  .brand-lockup .word {
    font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px;
    letter-spacing: 0.32em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--cream);
  }

  .hero-portrait {
    margin: 0 auto 36px;
    width: 140px; height: 140px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    overflow: hidden;
    border: 3px solid rgba(245, 234, 211, 0.2);
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 8px rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.12), 0 20px 60px -20px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
    position: relative;
  }
  .hero-portrait img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover; object-position: center top;
    display: block;
  }

  h1 {
    font-family: 'DM Serif Display', serif; font-weight: 400;
    font-size: clamp(64px, 11vw, 168px);
    line-height: 0.92; letter-spacing: -0.03em;
    color: var(--cream);
    max-width: 14ch; margin: 0 auto 40px;
  }
  h1 em { font-style: italic; color: var(--red); }

  .hero-sub {
    max-width: 58ch; margin: 0 auto 44px;
    font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.65;
    color: rgba(245, 234, 211, 0.75);
  }
  .hero-sub strong { color: var(--cream); font-weight: 600; }

  .hero-cta { display: inline-flex; gap: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; }

  .btn {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
    padding: 16px 26px; border-radius: 0;
    font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
    border: 1px solid transparent; cursor: pointer;
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .btn-primary { background: var(--red); color: #fff; }
  .btn-primary:hover {
    background: var(--cream); color: var(--night);
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 12px 30px -10px var(--red-glow);
  }
  .btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: var(--cream); border-color: var(--line-2); }
  .btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(245, 234, 211, 0.06); border-color: var(--cream); }
  .btn svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; }

  .hero-meta {
    margin-top: 56px;
    display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center;
    gap: 24px; flex-wrap: wrap;
    font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px;
    letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--ink-mute);
  }
  .hero-meta .divider { width: 20px; height: 1px; background: var(--line-2); }
  .hero-meta .dot {
    width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--red); box-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--red-glow);
    animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  @keyframes pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.3; } }

  /* Ticker */
  .ticker {
    padding: 18px 0;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--line); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
    overflow: hidden; position: relative;
    background: rgba(15, 26, 46, 0.4);
  }
  .ticker::before, .ticker::after {
    content: ""; position: absolute; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 120px; z-index: 2; pointer-events: none;
  }
  .ticker::before { left: 0; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--night-3), transparent); }
  .ticker::after { right: 0; background: linear-gradient(-90deg, var(--night-3), transparent); }
  .ticker-track {
    display: flex; gap: 56px; animation: scroll 40s linear infinite;
    white-space: nowrap;
    font-family: 'Archivo Black', sans-serif; font-size: 20px; color: var(--cream); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.03em;
  }
  .ticker-track span.decor { font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; color: var(--red); }
  .ticker-track span.ital { font-style: italic; color: var(--red); }
  @keyframes scroll { to { transform: translateX(-50%); } }

  /* Sections */
  section { padding: 140px 0; position: relative; z-index: 3; }

  .section-num {
    font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px;
    letter-spacing: 0.25em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--red);
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 28px;
  }
  .section-num::before { content: ""; width: 32px; height: 1px; background: var(--red); }

  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Archivo Black', sans-serif; font-weight: 400;
    font-size: clamp(44px, 6vw, 88px); line-height: 0.98;
    letter-spacing: -0.015em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--cream);
  }
  .section-title em { font-style: normal; color: var(--red); }

  /* About */
  .about-head { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.3fr; gap: 80px; margin-bottom: 72px; align-items: start; }
  .about-intro { font-size: 18px; color: rgba(245, 234, 211, 0.7); line-height: 1.65; margin-top: 24px; }
  .about-intro strong { color: var(--cream); font-weight: 600; }

  .about-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 32px; }
  .biz-card {
    background: rgba(245, 234, 211, 0.03);
    border: 1px solid var(--line-2); border-radius: 6px; padding: 0;
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
  }
  .biz-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); border-color: var(--red); }
  .biz-card .photo { aspect-ratio: 16/9; background-size: cover; background-position: center; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
  .biz-card .photo::after {
    content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 40%, rgba(15,26,46,0.85));
  }
  .biz-card .photo .tag {
    position: absolute; top: 16px; left: 16px; z-index: 2;
    font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px;
    letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 6px 12px;
    background: rgba(15, 26, 46, 0.75); backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    border: 1px solid var(--line-2); color: var(--cream);
  }
  .biz-card .body { padding: 32px; }
  .biz-card h3 {
    font-family: 'Archivo Black', sans-serif; font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 30px; letter-spacing: -0.01em; margin-bottom: 14px; text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .biz-card h3 em { font-style: normal; color: var(--red); }
  .biz-card p { color: rgba(245, 234, 211, 0.7); line-height: 1.65; margin-bottom: 24px; font-size: 15px; }
  .tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; }
  .chip {
    font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 6px 12px;
    background: rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.1);
    border: 1px solid rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.3); color: var(--red-light);
  }
  .chip.neutral { background: rgba(245, 234, 211, 0.04); border-color: var(--line-2); color: var(--ink-mute); }

  /* Links */
  .links-head { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: end; margin-bottom: 56px; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 24px; }

  .links-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(12, 1fr); gap: 12px; }

  .link-card {
    background: rgba(245, 234, 211, 0.04);
    border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 4px; padding: 26px;
    text-decoration: none; color: var(--cream);
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    transition: all 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between;
    min-height: 180px;
  }
  .link-card:hover { border-color: var(--red); background: rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.06); transform: translateY(-3px); }
  .link-card .top { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 24px; gap: 12px; }
  .link-card .brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }
  .link-card .logo {
    width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 8px;
    display: grid; place-items: center; flex-shrink: 0;
    background: rgba(245, 234, 211, 0.08); border: 1px solid var(--line-2);
  }
  .link-card .logo svg { width: 18px; height: 18px; display: block; }
  .link-card .platform {
    font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px;
    letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--ink-mute);
  }
  .link-card .arrow {
    width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%;
    border: 1px solid var(--line-2);
    display: grid; place-items: center;
    transition: all 0.3s; flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .link-card:hover .arrow { background: var(--red); border-color: var(--red); color: #fff; transform: rotate(-45deg); }
  .link-card .arrow svg { width: 12px; height: 12px; }
  .link-card h4 {
    font-family: 'Archivo Black', sans-serif; font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 21px; letter-spacing: 0em; margin-bottom: 6px; text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .link-card h4 em { font-style: normal; color: var(--red); }
  .link-card p { font-size: 13px; color: rgba(245, 234, 211, 0.6); }

  .link-card.wide { grid-column: span 6; }
  .link-card.med { grid-column: span 4; }
  .link-card.small { grid-column: span 3; }

  /* Feature card */
  .link-card.feature {
    grid-column: span 8; min-height: 260px;
    border-color: rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.4);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .link-card.feature .card-bg {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background-size: cover; background-position: center;
    filter: brightness(0.35) saturate(0.9);
    transition: filter 0.4s;
  }
  .link-card.feature:hover .card-bg { filter: brightness(0.45) saturate(1); }
  .link-card.feature::before {
    content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(15,26,46,0.7), rgba(146,43,33,0.35));
    z-index: 1;
  }
  .link-card.feature .top, .link-card.feature > div:last-child { position: relative; z-index: 2; }
  .link-card.feature h4 { font-size: 40px; max-width: 14ch; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.05; text-transform: uppercase; }
  .link-card.feature .arrow { width: 56px; height: 56px; background: var(--red); border-color: var(--red); color: #fff; }
  .link-card.feature .arrow svg { width: 18px; height: 18px; }
  .link-card.feature .logo { width: 40px; height: 40px; background: rgba(245, 234, 211, 0.12); }
  .link-card.feature .logo svg, .link-card.feature .logo img { width: 22px; height: 22px; }

  /* Funding card */
  .link-card.funding {
    grid-column: span 4; min-height: 260px;
    border-color: rgba(59, 74, 143, 0.4);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .link-card.funding .card-bg {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background-size: cover; background-position: center;
    filter: brightness(0.3) saturate(0.85);
    transition: filter 0.4s;
  }
  .link-card.funding:hover .card-bg { filter: brightness(0.4) saturate(1); }
  .link-card.funding::before {
    content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(59, 74, 143, 0.45), rgba(15, 26, 46, 0.5));
    z-index: 1;
  }
  .link-card.funding .top, .link-card.funding > div:last-child { position: relative; z-index: 2; }
  .link-card.funding h4 em { font-style: normal; color: #a8b5e6; }
  .link-card.funding:hover { border-color: #a8b5e6; }
  .link-card.funding:hover .arrow { background: #a8b5e6; border-color: #a8b5e6; color: var(--night); }
  .link-card.funding .logo { background: rgba(168, 181, 230, 0.15); border-color: rgba(168, 181, 230, 0.3); }

  /* Product card (Gumroad) */
  .link-card.product {
    grid-column: span 6;
    min-height: 200px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(245, 234, 211, 0.06), rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.04));
    border-color: rgba(245, 234, 211, 0.18);
  }
  .link-card.product:hover {
    border-color: var(--red);
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(245, 234, 211, 0.08), rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08));
  }
  .link-card.product h4 { font-size: 22px; text-transform: uppercase; }
  .link-card.product .badge {
    display: inline-block;
    font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 4px 8px;
    background: rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.15);
    border: 1px solid rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.3);
    color: var(--red-light);
    margin-top: 10px;
  }

  /* Contact */
  .contact { background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.04)); border-top: 1px solid var(--line); }
  .contact-inner { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.3fr 1fr; gap: 80px; align-items: start; }
  .contact-title {
    font-family: 'Archivo Black', sans-serif; font-weight: 400;
    font-size: clamp(56px, 8vw, 120px); line-height: 0.95;
    letter-spacing: -0.015em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--cream);
  }
  .contact-title em { font-style: normal; color: var(--red); }
  .contact-list { list-style: none; margin-top: 32px; }
  .contact-list li { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px; padding: 22px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line); }
  .contact-list .label {
    font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px;
    letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--red);
    width: 70px; flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .contact-list a { color: var(--cream); text-decoration: none; font-size: 19px; font-weight: 500; transition: color 0.2s; }
  .contact-list a:hover { color: var(--red); }

  /* Footer */
  footer { padding: 56px 0 40px; border-top: 1px solid var(--line); position: relative; z-index: 3; }
  .footer-inner { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px; }
  .footer-mark { font-family: 'Archivo Black', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.02em; }
  .footer-mark em { font-style: normal; color: var(--red); }
  .footer-meta {
    font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; color: var(--ink-mute);
    letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .disclosure { font-size: 11px; color: var(--ink-mute); line-height: 1.7; max-width: 88ch; }

  /* Reveal */
  .reveal { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px); transition: opacity 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); }
  .reveal.in { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }

  /* Mobile CTA bar */
  .mobile-cta {
    display: none;
    position: fixed; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; z-index: 90;
    padding: 12px 16px calc(12px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 0px));
    background: rgba(10, 19, 35, 0.88);
    backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(140%);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(140%);
    border-top: 1px solid var(--line-2);
    gap: 8px;
  }
  .mobile-cta a {
    flex: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    padding: 15px 12px;
    font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none;
    border-radius: 0; min-height: 48px;
  }
  .mobile-cta a.primary { background: var(--red); color: #fff; }
  .mobile-cta a.primary:active { background: var(--cream); color: var(--night); }
  .mobile-cta a.ghost { background: transparent; color: var(--cream); border: 1px solid var(--line-2); }
  .mobile-cta a.ghost:active { background: rgba(245, 234, 211, 0.08); }

  /* ========== TABLET & MOBILE ========== */
  @media (max-width: 960px) {
    .wrap { padding: 0 24px; }
    nav { top: 16px; padding: 7px 7px 7px 14px; max-width: calc(100vw - 24px); }
    nav .mark { font-size: 13px; padding-right: 10px; margin-right: 4px; }
    nav a { font-size: 11px; padding: 9px 10px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; }
    nav a.hide-mobile { display: none; }

    header { padding: 120px 0 80px; min-height: 90vh; }
    h1 { font-size: clamp(52px, 12vw, 88px); max-width: 12ch; margin-bottom: 28px; }

    .stamp { font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: 0.28em; margin-bottom: 24px; }
    .brand-lockup { margin-bottom: 20px; gap: 14px; }
    .brand-lockup .line { width: 32px; }
    .brand-lockup .word { font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.24em; }

    .hero-portrait { width: 110px; height: 110px; margin-bottom: 28px; }

    .hero-sub { font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 32px; padding: 0 4px; }
    .hero-cta { width: 100%; }
    .hero-cta .btn { flex: 1; justify-content: center; min-width: 0; }
    .btn { padding: 16px 20px; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.12em; min-height: 48px; }

    .hero-meta { margin-top: 40px; gap: 12px; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.2em; }
    .hero-meta .divider { display: none; }

    .ticker-track { font-size: 18px; gap: 40px; }
    section { padding: 72px 0; }

    .about-head { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 40px; }
    .about-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 20px; }
    .biz-card .body { padding: 24px; }
    .biz-card h3 { font-size: 22px; }
    .biz-card p { font-size: 14px; }

    .section-title { font-size: clamp(40px, 9vw, 64px); }
    .links-head { margin-bottom: 32px; gap: 16px; }
    .links-grid { gap: 10px; }
    .link-card, .link-card.wide, .link-card.med, .link-card.small,
    .link-card.feature, .link-card.funding { grid-column: span 12; }
    .link-card { min-height: 0; padding: 20px; }
    .link-card h4 { font-size: 18px; }
    .link-card .top { margin-bottom: 16px; }
    .link-card .arrow { width: 40px; height: 40px; }
    .link-card .logo { width: 36px; height: 36px; }
    .link-card .logo svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; }

    .link-card.feature { min-height: 180px; }
    .link-card.feature h4 { font-size: 28px; max-width: 14ch; }
    .link-card.feature .arrow { width: 48px; height: 48px; }
    .link-card.funding { min-height: 160px; }

    .contact-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 32px; }
    .contact-title { font-size: clamp(48px, 11vw, 72px); }
    .contact-list li { padding: 18px 0; gap: 16px; min-height: 48px; }
    .contact-list a { font-size: 17px; }
    .contact-list .label { width: 56px; font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 0.16em; }

    footer { padding: 40px 0 32px; padding-bottom: calc(100px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 0px)); }
    .footer-inner { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
    .disclosure { font-size: 10px; line-height: 1.6; }

    .mobile-cta { display: flex; }
  }

  /* ========== SMALL MOBILE ========== */
  @media (max-width: 560px) {
    .wrap { padding: 0 20px; }
    nav { gap: 0; padding: 6px 6px 6px 12px; }
    nav .mark { font-size: 12px; padding-right: 8px; }
    nav a { font-size: 10px; padding: 9px 8px; }
    nav .cta { padding: 9px 12px; }

    header { padding: 110px 0 72px; }
    h1 { font-size: clamp(42px, 13vw, 64px); line-height: 0.94; letter-spacing: -0.025em; }

    .stamp { font-size: 13px; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
    .brand-lockup .line { width: 20px; }
    .brand-lockup .word { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.2em; }

    .hero-portrait { width: 96px; height: 96px; margin-bottom: 24px; border-width: 2px; }

    .hero-sub { font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 28px; }
    .hero-cta { flex-direction: column; width: 100%; gap: 10px; }
    .hero-cta .btn { width: 100%; }

    .hero-meta { flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; align-items: center; font-size: 11px; }
    .ticker { padding: 14px 0; }
    .ticker-track { font-size: 16px; gap: 32px; }
    .ticker::before, .ticker::after { width: 60px; }

    section { padding: 56px 0; }
    .section-num { font-size: 13px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
    .section-num::before { width: 24px; }
    .about-intro { font-size: 16px; }
    .biz-card .body { padding: 20px; }
    .biz-card h3 { font-size: 24px; }

    .link-card { padding: 18px; }
    .link-card h4 { font-size: 19px; }
    .link-card p { font-size: 12px; }
    .link-card .platform { font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.18em; }
    .link-card .logo { width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 7px; }
    .link-card .arrow { width: 38px; height: 38px; }
    .link-card.feature { min-height: 160px; }
    .link-card.feature h4 { font-size: 24px; }
    .link-card.feature .arrow { width: 44px; height: 44px; }

    .contact-title { font-size: clamp(40px, 13vw, 56px); }
    .contact-list a { font-size: 16px; }
    .contact-list .label { width: 48px; }
    .mobile-cta a { font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.12em; padding: 14px 10px; }
  }

  @media (max-width: 960px) {
    .grain { opacity: 0.08; }
    .ambient::before, .ambient::after { filter: blur(60px); }
  }

  @supports (-webkit-touch-callout: none) {
    body { -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%; }
    a, button { -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.15); }
    input, textarea, button, select, a { -webkit-touch-callout: none; }
  }

  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    *, *::before, *::after {
      animation-duration: 0.01ms !important;
      animation-iteration-count: 1 !important;
      transition-duration: 0.01ms !important;
    }
    .reveal { opacity: 1; transform: none; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="ambient"></div>
<div class="grain"></div>

<nav>
  <span class="mark">Funded <em>By</em> Pyles</span>
  <a href="#about" class="hide-mobile">About</a>
  <a href="#links">Links</a>
  <a href="#contact" class="hide-mobile">Contact</a>
  <a href="https://nealpyles.my1003app.com/1929617/register" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="cta">Apply</a>
</nav>

<div class="wrap">

  <!-- HERO -->
  <header>
    <div class="skyline"></div>
    <div class="hero-inner">
      <div class="stamp reveal">
        <span class="star">&#9733;</span>
        <span>Deep In The Heart</span>
        <span class="star">&#9733;</span>
      </div>

      <div class="brand-lockup reveal">
        <span class="line"></span>
        <span class="word">Funded By Pyles</span>
        <span class="line"></span>
      </div>

      <div class="hero-portrait reveal">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Neal Pyles" />
      </div>

      <h1 class="reveal">
        Plain talk. <em>Fast answers.</em> Real Texas service.
      </h1>

      <p class="hero-sub reveal">
        I'm <strong>Neal Pyles</strong>, a Frisco based mortgage advisor at Lone Star Financing and a broker at Closer Capital. Home loans, business funding, no pressure, no jargon. If it's in Texas, I've probably closed a loan there.
      </p>

      <div class="hero-cta reveal">
        <a href="https://nealpyles.my1003app.com/1929617/register" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="btn btn-primary">
          Start a mortgage
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="M5 12h14M13 5l7 7-7 7"/></svg>
        </a>
        <a href="https://closercap.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="btn btn-ghost">
          Business funding
        </a>
      </div>

      <div class="hero-meta reveal">
        <span><span class="dot"></span>Available for new clients</span>
        <span class="divider"></span>
        <span>Frisco, Texas</span>
        <span class="divider"></span>
        <span>NMLS #1929617</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </header>

  <!-- Ticker -->
  <div class="ticker">
    <div class="ticker-track">
      <span class="ital">First Time Buyers</span><span class="decor">&#9733;</span>
      <span>FHA &middot; VA &middot; Conventional</span><span class="decor">&#9733;</span>
      <span class="ital">Self Employed</span><span class="decor">&#9733;</span>
      <span>DSCR Investment</span><span class="decor">&#9733;</span>
      <span class="ital">Down Payment Assistance</span><span class="decor">&#9733;</span>
      <span>Business Lines of Credit</span><span class="decor">&#9733;</span>
      <span class="ital">SBA Loans</span><span class="decor">&#9733;</span>
      <span>Equipment Financing</span><span class="decor">&#9733;</span>
      <span class="ital">First Time Buyers</span><span class="decor">&#9733;</span>
      <span>FHA &middot; VA &middot; Conventional</span><span class="decor">&#9733;</span>
      <span class="ital">Self Employed</span><span class="decor">&#9733;</span>
      <span>DSCR Investment</span><span class="decor">&#9733;</span>
      <span class="ital">Down Payment Assistance</span><span class="decor">&#9733;</span>
      <span>Business Lines of Credit</span><span class="decor">&#9733;</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ABOUT -->
  <section id="about">
    <div class="about-head">
      <div class="reveal">
        <div class="section-num">01 &mdash; Who</div>
        <h2 class="section-title">A <em>Texan</em> in your corner.</h2>
      </div>
      <p class="about-intro reveal">
        More than a decade inside the mortgage game. UNT alum. North Texas born and raised. Now with <strong>Lone Star Financing</strong>, a trusted Texas mortgage broker with access to 25+ lenders and wholesale pricing. I cut the old school high pressure playbook and built something that actually works for real people buying real homes and running real businesses across Texas.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="about-grid">
      <article class="biz-card reveal">
        <div class="photo" style="background-image: url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');">
          <span class="tag">Residential</span>
        </div>
        <div class="body">
          <h3>Lone Star <em>Financing</em></h3>
          <p>Texas mortgage broker with access to wholesale rates and 25+ lenders. FHA, VA, conventional, DSCR, jumbo, USDA, and bank statement programs. Pre qualify in minutes. Closings in as fast as 21 days.</p>
          <div class="tags">
            <span class="chip">NMLS #1929617</span>
            <span class="chip neutral">Purchase</span>
            <span class="chip neutral">Refinance</span>
            <span class="chip neutral">Investment</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </article>

      <article class="biz-card reveal">
        <div class="photo" style="background-image: url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');">
          <span class="tag">Business</span>
        </div>
        <div class="body">
          <h3>Closer <em>Capital</em></h3>
          <p>Business lending brokerage for operators who need capital without the bank runaround. Lines of credit, SBA loans, equipment financing, working capital, and commercial real estate.</p>
          <div class="tags">
            <span class="chip">closercap.com</span>
            <span class="chip neutral">SBA</span>
            <span class="chip neutral">Lines of Credit</span>
            <span class="chip neutral">CRE</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </article>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- LINKS -->
  <section id="links">
    <div class="links-head">
      <div class="reveal">
        <div class="section-num">02 &mdash; Links</div>
        <h2 class="section-title">Pick a <em>door.</em></h2>
      </div>
      <p class="reveal" style="color:rgba(245,234,211,0.65);max-width:36ch;font-size:15px;">
        Every platform, every profile, every way to get in touch. All in one place.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="links-grid">

      <!-- Apply feature tile -->
      <a href="https://nealpyles.my1003app.com/1929617/register" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="link-card feature reveal">
        <div class="card-bg" style="background-image:url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');"></div>
        <div class="top">
          <span class="brand">
            <span class="platform">Lone Star Financing</span>
          </span>
          <span class="arrow"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M5 12h14M13 5l7 7-7 7"/></svg></span>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h4>Apply for a <em>mortgage</em></h4>
          <p>Pre qualify in minutes. Access to 25+ lenders and wholesale rates.</p>
        </div>
      </a>

      <!-- Closer Capital -->
      <a href="https://closercap.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="link-card funding reveal">
        <div class="card-bg" style="background-image:url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');"></div>
        <div class="top">
          <span class="brand">
            <span class="platform">Closer Capital</span>
          </span>
          <span class="arrow"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M5 12h14M13 5l7 7-7 7"/></svg></span>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h4><em>Business</em> funding</h4>
          <p>SBA, lines of credit, equipment, CRE.</p>
        </div>
      </a>

      <!-- Lone Star site -->
      <a href="https://lonestarfinancing.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="link-card med reveal">
        <div class="top">
          <span class="brand">
            <span class="logo" style="background:rgba(192,57,43,0.15);border-color:rgba(192,57,43,0.35);">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#e74c3c" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polygon points="12,2 15.09,8.26 22,9.27 17,14.14 18.18,21.02 12,17.77 5.82,21.02 7,14.14 2,9.27 8.91,8.26"/></svg>
            </span>
            <span class="platform">Lone Star Financing</span>
          </span>
          <span class="arrow"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M7 7l10 10M17 7v10H7"/></svg></span>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h4>Company site</h4>
          <p>Programs, rates, and team info.</p>
        </div>
      </a>

      <!-- LinkedIn -->
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/nealpyles/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="link-card med reveal">
        <div class="top">
          <span class="brand">
            <span class="logo" style="background:#0a66c2;border-color:transparent;">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path fill="#fff" d="M20.5 2h-17A1.5 1.5 0 002 3.5v17A1.5 1.5 0 003.5 22h17a1.5 1.5 0 001.5-1.5v-17A1.5 1.5 0 0020.5 2zM8 19H5v-9h3zM6.5 8.25A1.75 1.75 0 118.3 6.5a1.78 1.78 0 01-1.8 1.75zM19 19h-3v-4.74c0-1.42-.6-1.93-1.38-1.93A1.74 1.74 0 0013 14.19a.66.66 0 000 .14V19h-3v-9h2.9v1.3a3.11 3.11 0 012.7-1.4c1.55 0 3.36.86 3.36 3.66z"/></svg>
            </span>
            <span class="platform">LinkedIn</span>
          </span>
          <span class="arrow"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M7 7l10 10M17 7v10H7"/></svg></span>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h4>Connect professionally</h4>
          <p>Career, insights, posts.</p>
        </div>
      </a>

      <!-- Instagram -->
      <a href="https://www.instagram.com/nrpyles" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="link-card med reveal">
        <div class="top">
          <span class="brand">
            <span class="logo" style="background:linear-gradient(45deg,#f09433,#e6683c,#dc2743,#cc2366,#bc1888);border-color:transparent;">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="5"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4"/><circle cx="17.5" cy="6.5" r="1.1" fill="#fff" stroke="none"/></svg>
            </span>
            <span class="platform">Instagram</span>
          </span>
          <span class="arrow"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M7 7l10 10M17 7v10H7"/></svg></span>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h4>@nrpyles</h4>
          <p>Reels, behind the scenes, and Bear.</p>
        </div>
      </a>

      <!-- Facebook -->
      <a href="https://www.facebook.com/PylesMortgage/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="link-card med reveal">
        <div class="top">
          <span class="brand">
            <span class="logo" style="background:#1877f2;border-color:transparent;">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path fill="#fff" d="M22 12a10 10 0 10-11.56 9.88v-6.99H7.9V12h2.54V9.8c0-2.51 1.49-3.89 3.78-3.89 1.09 0 2.24.2 2.24.2v2.46h-1.26c-1.24 0-1.63.77-1.63 1.56V12h2.77l-.44 2.89h-2.33v6.99A10 10 0 0022 12z"/></svg>
            </span>
            <span class="platform">Facebook</span>
          </span>
          <span class="arrow"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M7 7l10 10M17 7v10H7"/></svg></span>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h4>Mortgage page</h4>
          <p>Market updates and client stories.</p>
        </div>
      </a>

      <!-- Zillow -->
      <a href="https://www.zillow.com/lender-profile/NPyles17/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="link-card wide reveal">
        <div class="top">
          <span class="brand">
            <span class="logo" style="background:#006aff;border-color:transparent;">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path fill="#fff" d="M12 2L2 10v1.5l3-1v9.5h14v-9.5l3 1V10L12 2zm-3.5 16v-6.4L12 9l3.5 2.6V18h-2v-4h-3v4h-2z"/></svg>
            </span>
            <span class="platform">Zillow</span>
          </span>
          <span class="arrow"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M7 7l10 10M17 7v10H7"/></svg></span>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h4>Reviews &amp; rates</h4>
          <p>Client reviews and rate comparisons on Zillow.</p>
        </div>
      </a>

      <!-- Yelp -->
      <a href="https://www.yelp.com/biz/neal-pyles-cmg-home-loans-frisco" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="link-card med reveal">
        <div class="top">
          <span class="brand">
            <span class="logo" style="background:#d32323;border-color:transparent;">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path fill="#fff" d="M11.24 15.86l-.02 4.69a.93.93 0 01-.3.69.88.88 0 01-.68.25 8.8 8.8 0 01-3.5-1.4.93.93 0 01-.38-.65.9.9 0 01.18-.72l2.85-3.77a1 1 0 011.15-.29 1 1 0 01.7.97zm-3.2-2.4a1 1 0 00-.43-1.11 1.07 1.07 0 00-.5-.14L2.48 12a.9.9 0 00-.7.27.9.9 0 00-.27.68 8.7 8.7 0 001.3 3.56.88.88 0 00.67.4.92.92 0 00.72-.2l3.5-2.85a1 1 0 00.34-.4zm4.17-3.3c.32-.53.3-1.83.14-4.5A37.63 37.63 0 0012 1.02c-.12-.3-.44-.63-1.27-.78a7.56 7.56 0 00-4.98.83c-.34.2-.52.46-.5.77 0 .2.12.37.22.54l5.87 8.9a1 1 0 001.01.44 1 1 0 00.85-.57zM20.83 14a8.76 8.76 0 00-1.99-2.96 1 1 0 00-.73-.2 1 1 0 00-.66.33l-3.16 3.44a1 1 0 00-.07 1.2 1 1 0 00.37.36l4.13 2.21a.93.93 0 00.71.1.9.9 0 00.6-.4 8.6 8.6 0 001-4 1 1 0 00-.2-.08zm-1.4-5.36a8.76 8.76 0 00-2.82-2.13 1 1 0 00-.74-.05 1 1 0 00-.57.48l-2.32 4.24a1 1 0 00.01 1 1 1 0 00.88.45l4.82-.57a.93.93 0 00.66-.38.88.88 0 00.17-.71 8.6 8.6 0 00-.1-2.33z"/></svg>
            </span>
            <span class="platform">Yelp</span>
          </span>
          <span class="arrow"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M7 7l10 10M17 7v10H7"/></svg></span>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h4>Frisco reviews</h4>
          <p>Local borrower feedback.</p>
        </div>
      </a>

      <!-- Email -->
      <a href="mailto:npyles@lonestarfinancing.com" class="link-card med reveal">
        <div class="top">
          <span class="brand">
            <span class="logo" style="background:rgba(192,57,43,0.15);border-color:rgba(192,57,43,0.35);">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#e74c3c" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="3" y="5" width="18" height="14" rx="2"/><path d="M3 7l9 6 9-6"/></svg>
            </span>
            <span class="platform">Email</span>
          </span>
          <span class="arrow"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M7 7l10 10M17 7v10H7"/></svg></span>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h4>Get in my inbox</h4>
          <p>npyles@lonestarfinancing.com</p>
        </div>
      </a>

      <!-- Lazy Agent AI Toolkit -->
      <a href="https://thelazyagent.gumroad.com/l/thelazyagent" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="link-card product reveal">
        <div class="top">
          <span class="brand">
            <span class="logo" style="background:rgba(255,107,0,0.15);border-color:rgba(255,107,0,0.3);">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#ff6b00" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 2a4 4 0 014 4v2H8V6a4 4 0 014-4z"/><rect x="3" y="10" width="18" height="11" rx="2"/><path d="M9 15h6"/></svg>
            </span>
            <span class="platform">Gumroad &middot; Digital Product</span>
          </span>
          <span class="arrow"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M7 7l10 10M17 7v10H7"/></svg></span>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h4>The Lazy Agent <em>AI Toolkit</em></h4>
          <p>AI prompts built for real estate agents and lenders. Copy, paste, close more deals.</p>
          <span class="badge">Digital Download</span>
        </div>
      </a>

      <!-- TikTok Automation Kit -->
      <a href="https://thelazyagent.gumroad.com/l/tiktok-automation-kit" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="link-card product reveal">
        <div class="top">
          <span class="brand">
            <span class="logo" style="background:rgba(0,242,234,0.1);border-color:rgba(0,242,234,0.25);">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#00f2ea" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M9 12a4 4 0 104 4V4c1.5 2 4 3 6 3"/></svg>
            </span>
            <span class="platform">Gumroad &middot; Digital Product</span>
          </span>
          <span class="arrow"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M7 7l10 10M17 7v10H7"/></svg></span>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h4>TikTok <em>Automation Kit</em></h4>
          <p>Launch a faceless motivation page that makes money while you sleep.</p>
          <span class="badge">Digital Download</span>
        </div>
      </a>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- CONTACT -->
  <section id="contact" class="contact">
    <div class="contact-inner">
      <div class="reveal">
        <div class="section-num">03 &mdash; Contact</div>
        <h2 class="contact-title">Let's get<br/>you <em>funded.</em></h2>
        <p style="color:rgba(245,234,211,0.7);margin-top:24px;max-width:46ch;font-size:17px;line-height:1.6;">
          Buying a home, refinancing, or need capital for your business? Call, text, or shoot me an email. Born in North Texas, based in Frisco, working across all of Texas and beyond.
        </p>
      </div>

      <ul class="contact-list reveal">
        <li>
          <span class="label">Call</span>
          <a href="tel:4694535203">(469) 453&#8239;5203</a>
        </li>
        <li>
          <span class="label">Text</span>
          <a href="tel:4697346352">(469) 734&#8239;6352</a>
        </li>
        <li>
          <span class="label">Email</span>
          <a href="mailto:npyles@lonestarfinancing.com">npyles@lonestarfinancing.com</a>
        </li>
        <li>
          <span class="label">Apply</span>
          <a href="https://nealpyles.my1003app.com/1929617/register" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Start your application</a>
        </li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </section>

  <footer>
    <div class="footer-inner">
      <span class="footer-mark">Funded <em>By</em> Pyles</span>
      <span class="footer-meta">&copy; 2026 &middot; Neal Pyles &middot; NMLS #1929617</span>
    </div>
    <p class="disclosure">
      Lone Star Financing is a DBA of Castle Hills Mortgage, NMLS #262157. 6860 North Dallas Parkway, Suite 200, Plano, Texas 75024. Equal Housing Opportunity. All loans subject to credit approval. Rates and terms subject to change without notice. As a mortgage broker, Lone Star Financing provides access to wholesale rates and multiple lenders. Closer Capital is a separate business lending brokerage operation and not affiliated with Lone Star Financing.
    </p>
  </footer>

</div>

<!-- Sticky mobile CTA -->
<div class="mobile-cta">
  <a href="https://nealpyles.my1003app.com/1929617/register" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="primary">Apply</a>
  <a href="tel:4697346352" class="ghost">Text Neal</a>
</div>

<script>
  const io = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach((entry, i) => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        setTimeout(() => entry.target.classList.add('in'), i * 50);
        io.unobserve(entry.target);
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.08, rootMargin: '0px 0px -40px 0px' });

  document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => io.observe(el));

  window.addEventListener('load', () => {
    const heroReveals = document.querySelectorAll('header .reveal');
    heroReveals.forEach((el, i) => {
      setTimeout(() => el.classList.add('in'), 100 + i * 140);
    });
  });
</script>

</body>
</html>
